name: Raisin Bread (Lewis)
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Yeast, or a bit more
recipeInstructions:
1. When adding raisins, the bread won't rise as high.
2. If you add bran or other types of flour, the bread won't rise as high.
3. I have made hundreds of loaves of raisin bread and not one has been the same. I change something each time.
4. This is my favorite recipe. I hope you like it.
5. You can also try sourdough raisin bread by replacing 1 cup of water with starter, using 5 cardamom seeds (remove from pod), and either omitting or adding more oatmeal.
6. Adjust the dough consistency by checking the water amount during kneading.
